title: Elemental Beasts
description: Elemental Mobs Mod brings the raw forces of nature to Minecraft by adding unique, powerful creatures based on the elements.
body:
Elemental Mobs Mod brings the raw forces of nature to Minecraft by adding unique, powerful creatures based on the elements. You’ll encounter:

🪨 A massive stone golem with unstoppable strength.

🌿 A feral, terrifying flower-beast that lurks in the fields.

🌪️ A swift and elusive wind spirit.

🌊 A graceful but dangerous water elemental.

☀️ A blazing sun creature that lights up the battlefield.

Each mob has its own abilities, behaviors, and challenges, making your world more alive — and more dangerous. Can you defeat the power of the elements? You need to have two prerequisites for this:

geckolib-forge-1.20.1

particlepresets-forge-1.20.1

Make sure to install these two along with the mod in your Minecraft!
